feature: Ollama and OpenCode providers for bop providers command
workflow_rationale: Adding two new provider implementations (Ollama local/cloud + OpenCode) to the existing providers module. Follows the same trait pattern as existing Claude/Codex/Gemini providers. Single Rust crate, no multi-service complexity.

phases.name: Extend ProviderSnapshot and Table Display
phases.description: Add loaded_models field to ProviderSnapshot for Ollama's custom JSON output, and update the table renderer to display model names for non-quota providers.

subtasks.description: Add loaded_models: Option<Vec<String>> field to ProviderSnapshot struct with serde skip_serializing_if. Update print_providers_table to display loaded model names when primary_pct is None. When loaded_models is Some and non-empty, show comma-separated model names after the dash columns; show '(idle)' when the vec is empty. Add primary_label/secondary_label display in the table header by using the snapshot's label fields instead of hardcoded '5h'/'7d'. Ensure existing tests still pass.

verification.command: cd /Users/studio/bop && cargo test -p bop providers::tests && cargo clippy -p bop -- -D warnings 2>&1 | tail -5
verification.expected: All existing tests pass, clippy clean

subtasks.notes: Added loaded_models: Option<Vec<String>> field to ProviderSnapshot struct with serde skip_serializing_if. Updated print_providers_table to display loaded model names when primary_pct is None. When loaded_models is Some and non-empty, show comma-separated model names; show '(idle)' when empty. Added dynamic primary_label/secondary_label display in table header. All existing tests pass and clippy is clean.

phases.name: Ollama Provider (Local + Cloud)
phases.description: Create OllamaLocalProvider and OllamaCloudProvider implementing the Provider trait. Local mode detects via TCP port check on 11434, fetches loaded models from /api/ps. Cloud mode detects via OLLAMA_API_KEY env var or ~/.ollama/config.json, fetches with Bearer auth.

subtasks.description: Create crates/bop-cli/src/providers/ollama.rs with OllamaLocalProvider. detect(): use std::net::TcpStream::connect_timeout to localhost:11434 with 500ms timeout. fetch(): GET http://localhost:11434/api/ps, parse {models:[{name, size_vram, expires_at}]}, compute loaded model names, find earliest expires_at for reset_at, return ProviderSnapshot with provider='ollama-local', display_name='Ollama (local)', primary_pct=None, source='http', loaded_models=parsed model names. Handle empty models list as '(idle)'. Add parse_ps_response() as a separate testable function. Add unit tests for: parse_ps_response with models, parse_ps_response with empty models, parse_ps_response with expires_at, parse_ps_response with malformed JSON.

verification.command: cd /Users/studio/bop && cargo test -p bop providers::ollama -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -20

subtasks.notes: Created crates/bop-cli/src/providers/ollama.rs with OllamaLocalProvider. Implemented detect() using TcpStream::connect_timeout to localhost:11434 with 500ms timeout. Implemented fetch() with GET http://localhost:11434/api/ps, parsing {models:[{name, size_vram, expires_at}]} response. Added parse_ps_response() as a separate testable function. Computed loaded model names and earliest expires_at for reset_at. Returns ProviderSnapshot with provider='ollama-local', display_name='Ollama (local)', primary_pct=None, source='http', loaded_models=parsed model names. Handles empty models list correctly. Added 4 unit tests: parse_ps_response with models, parse_ps_response with empty models, parse_ps_response with expires_at, parse_ps_response with malformed JSON. Registered OllamaLocalProvider in all_providers(). All tests pass.

subtasks.description: Add OllamaCloudProvider to ollama.rs. detect(): check OLLAMA_API_KEY env var OR read ~/.ollama/config.json for api_key field. fetch(): GET https://ollama.com/api/ps with Authorization: Bearer <api_key>, parse same response shape as local. Return ProviderSnapshot with provider='ollama-cloud', display_name='Ollama (cloud)', source='http'. Add read_cloud_credentials() as a separate testable function. Add unit tests for: detect with env var set, detect with config file, detect with neither, cloud credentials parsing.

verification.command: cd /Users/studio/bop && cargo test -p bop providers::ollama -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -20
verification.expected: All ollama unit tests pass (local + cloud)

phases.name: OpenCode Provider
phases.description: Create OpenCodeProvider implementing the Provider trait. Detects via TCP port check on 4096, fetches session list and most recent session details for token/cost data.

subtasks.description: Create crates/bop-cli/src/providers/opencode.rs with OpenCodeProvider. detect(): use std::net::TcpStream::connect_timeout to localhost:4096 with 500ms timeout. fetch(): GET http://localhost:4096/session to list sessions, find most recently updated session, GET http://localhost:4096/session/:id for details, extract tokens_used and cost_usd from session metadata if present. Return ProviderSnapshot with provider='opencode', display_name='opencode', primary_pct=None, source='http'. Add parse_sessions_response() and parse_session_detail() as separate testable functions. Add unit tests for: parse with sessions, parse with empty sessions, parse session detail with tokens/cost, parse session detail without tokens/cost, malformed JSON.

verification.command: cd /Users/studio/bop && cargo test -p bop providers::opencode -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -20

phases.name: Registration and Integration
phases.description: Register Ollama and OpenCode providers in the module system and all_providers() registry. Run full verification suite.

subtasks.description: Add 'pub mod ollama;' and 'pub mod opencode;' declarations to mod.rs. Register OllamaLocalProvider, OllamaCloudProvider, and OpenCodeProvider in all_providers() function. Ensure the ordering is: claude, codex, gemini, ollama-local, ollama-cloud, opencode.

Run full verification: cargo test -p bop (all provider tests including new ones), cargo clippy -p bop -- -D warnings (no warnings), cargo fmt -p bop --check (formatting clean). Verify JSON output shape with: ./target/debug/bop providers --json (should include all registered providers). Fix any compilation, lint, or format issues.

verification.command: cd /Users/studio/bop && cargo test -p bop && cargo clippy -p bop -- -D warnings && cargo fmt -p bop --check
verification.expected: All tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1-snapshot-extension, modify different files (ollama.rs vs opencode.rs)

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Phases 2+3 could run in parallel but share mod.rs registration, so sequential is safer

acceptance_criteria: cargo clippy -p bop -- -D warnings is clean
./target/debug/bop providers --json includes all provider types in output schema

verification_steps.name: Unit Tests (all providers)
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All tests pass including new ollama and opencode tests

verification_strategy.reasoning: Low risk — adding new provider files following existing patterns. No changes to core dispatch logic. Unit tests verify JSON parsing without network calls.
